description_long: This is a robust, cubic wooden storage box reinforced with large, black metal corner brackets. The box features thick, dark wooden planks arranged vertically on each side, with a prominent X-shaped cross-bracing pattern on all visible faces, adding both structural strength and visual interest. The wood has a weathered, matte finish, suggesting durability and suitability for outdoor or industrial environments. The metal corner protectors are slightly worn, indicating frequent handling or movement. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, and the top appears to be fixed with no discernible lid or opening mechanism. The overall design is utilitarian, making it ideal for use in garages, warehouses, or as a decorative urban object.
description: A sturdy, dark wooden storage box with black metal corner reinforcements and X-shaped cross-bracing on each side. The box has a rugged, industrial look with no visible handles or lid.
description_view_0: The front view shows the X-braced wooden panel and all four black metal corner brackets clearly, emphasizing the box's reinforced structure.
description_view_1: This view is nearly identical to view 0, with subtle lighting differences on the wood grain and metal corners.
description_view_2: The X-bracing and corner reinforcements remain prominent, with slight shadow variations highlighting the depth of the wood panels.
description_view_3: Similar to the other views, this angle shows the X-bracing and metal corners, with minor changes in wood texture visibility due to lighting.
